purpose: Route AgentLab, OMA, and RCA feedback to repo-local professional skills without creating a second visual truth source, visual memory body owner, or export gate.
source_of_truth_refs: tests/rca-ppt-three-route-agent-lab-suite.test.js#RCA PPT capability map routes AgentLab visual feedback fixture to professional skills and owner closeout boundary
tests/rca-ppt-three-route-agent-lab-suite.test.js#RCA PPT dry-run feedback tokens resolve to professional skills without live artifacts

no_merge_rationale: Template profiling is a pre-route reference-deck and layout-capacity analysis method that can feed image-first, HTML, and native PPTX routes.
Visual direction owns deck-level style, rhythm, density, and anti-template constraints after the profile exists.
Native PPT designer owns editable_shape_plan, coordinates, shape grammar, and repair only when native PPTX is explicitly selected.
Merging profiler into visual director would blur profiling with visual judgment; merging it into native designer would incorrectly bind non-native template analysis to a native-only route.
professional_skill_consolidation.consolidation_result: template_profile and placeholder_capacity feedback tokens now route first to rca-template-profiler; downstream visual/native capabilities consume the profile for style lock or route-specific binding.
professional_skill_consolidation.old_entry_policy: No tombstone is needed because rca-template-profiler remains active. If retired later, keep only a thin redirect to the surviving owner and preserve this rationale.

xhs_content_strategy.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch single/series mode judgment, audience framing, medical content discipline, or the single-note handoff before visual direction.

xhs_series_architecture.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch chapter roles, non-overlapping note briefs, evidence anchors, page estimates, transitions, or publication arc before planning individual notes.

storyline.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch claim spine, storyline, slide blueprint, or evidence placement policy before visual direction.

outline.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch detailed outline, page sequence, slide roles, or evidence placement before visual direction.

visual_direction.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch visual language, rhythm, density controls, proof-object planning, and style lock before page authoring.

style.default_patch_surface_hint: Route style failures to visual direction and template/profile rules; do not patch rendered artifacts as the source of style truth.

page_authoring.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch page-level authoring policy or focused tests; helpers may materialize refs but cannot choose the design.

visual_review.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch rendered-review criteria or repair-target routing; AgentLab/OMA scores are not RCA review/export verdicts.

native_pptx_editability.default_patch_surface_hint: Route native editability failures to editable_shape_plan, shape manifest, true render proof, or native repair policy.

template_profile.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch reference deck profiling, semantic layout inventory, zones, and template profile rows in rca-template-profiler before downstream visual or native binding.

placeholder_capacity.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch per-zone capacity, readable floors, object affordances, safe insets, and overflow risk in rca-template-profiler; visual/native consumers only bind or apply the profile.

ppt_visual_density.default_patch_surface_hint: Route PPT density failures to visual direction density bands, page-level text budget, or screenshot review repair targets; do not patch rendered artifacts as truth.

serial_pipeline.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch source-lock, claim spine, outline, blueprint, and per-page contract order before any artifact creation route.

spec_lock.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch deck-level visual spec lock or native design_spec_lock before materialization; helpers cannot invent the spec.

progressive_disclosure.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch claim sequence, rhythm, or per-page hierarchy so content unfolds one decision at a time.

style_boundary.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch RCA-owned style boundary and template/profile rules; external references remain inputs, not authority.

visual_qa.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch visual QA criteria, screenshot review checks, or repair-target routing; AgentLab score is not an RCA verdict.

visual_memory.default_patch_surface_hint: Route visual memory feedback to RCA memory proposal and accept/reject review methods; do not patch memory body, artifacts, verdicts, or owner receipts through OPL.

memory_writeback.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch writeback proposal, evidence-linking, or accept/reject lifecycle guidance; OPL may transport refs only and cannot accept/reject visual memory.

review_export_memory.default_patch_surface_hint: Route review/export memory feedback to curator and reviewer method refs; memory cannot replace screenshot review, export verdict, or owner receipt.

editable_pptx_grammar.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch editable shape grammar, template zones, shape manifest roles, or native repair policy before rerendering.

visual_density.default_patch_surface_hint: Update the professional skill or stage prompt that owns density planning, page fit, or rendered review; do not edit visual truth artifacts.

layout_quality.default_patch_surface_hint: Route repeated layout, rhythm, hierarchy, or collision feedback to visual direction, page authoring, or review skill refs.

ppt_review.default_patch_surface_hint: Patch review criteria or repair-target routing; AgentLab/OMA scores are not RCA review/export verdicts.

capabilities.externalization_reason: Rich app skill is a required standard OPL primary skill source; plugin skill remains a Codex carrier mirror and does not own RCA visual truth.
Xiaohongshu content and series strategy is an AI-first RCA professional method; runtime code may inject, validate, and persist it but cannot author the strategy.

capabilities.externalization_reason: RCA stage prompts own stage goals and receipts while professional skills own reusable PPT methods.
RCA tools materialize PPT, screenshots, and exports; they do not choose visual strategy.
RCA visual truth, source, export, and review memory are declarative knowledge refs.
RCA quality gates review refs and repair targets; review/export verdicts remain owner-gated.
Agent Lab receives RCA suite refs and feedback tokens without writing visual truth or export verdicts.
